name: dsg-governance
description: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.
author: DSG Team

skills.name: dsg-action-layer-ged
skills.description: Primary governance skill — studio-style control layer: plan, deterministic gate, permission verdict, browser-first execution after approval. Covers Deterministic Safety Gate, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence, Runtime Lifecycle, and Hermes Executor.

skills.name: dsg-github-marketplace-action-controller
skills.description: Package DSG gates and proofs as reusable GitHub Marketplace Actions with deterministic GO/NO-GO validation, audit proof, and secure deploy checks.

skills.name: dsg-multi-governance-orchestrator
skills.description: Multi-source governance orchestration: UI trust upgrades, action-layer permission gates, deterministic execution, marketplace/enterprise cutover, architecture pages, and production GO/NO-GO validation.

skills.name: dsg-marketplace-fix
skills.description: Remediation skill — fixes the premature Claude.ai README claim and verifies the production OAuth authorization-server endpoint before marketplace launch.

pro.description: 5 000 gate evaluations / month + compliance bundle access

enterprise.description: Unlimited evals + SLA + Hermes executor access
